mapper.select: /* 챗봇가이드 인사멘트 조회 */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , C.CODE_NM AS GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON A.GUIDE_TP_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'GI000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC

/* 챗봇가이드 안내멘트 조회 */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , C.CODE_NM AS GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.DSPL_COND , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON A.GUIDE_TP_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'GI000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC

/* 챗봇가이드 에러메시지 조회 */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , C.CODE_NM AS GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.MAX_CHARS , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON A.GUIDE_TP_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'GI000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC

/* 챗봇가이드 점검/장애 조회 */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , C.CODE_NM AS GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.START_DT , A.END_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON A.GUIDE_TP_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'GI000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC
